bot.name: Gov Contract Drift
bot.subtitle: US 政府 $500M+ 契約発表 → 10d hold drift. defense (LMT/BA/RTX/GD/NOC) + health. Sh+1.11 win 60% n=563
bot.role: US gov spending contract drift. 検証 (2018-2025 n=4125 events): $500M+ 契約 → 5-10d hold で Sh+1.11 win 60% / $1B+ 10d Sh+1.03 EXCESS +0.55%/event vs SPY. universe: LMT/BA/RTX/GD/NOC 等 defense + health 75 ticker。年 70-90 events 想定。sleeve 2% × max 5 = 10% NetLiq。data source: data/external_usaspending または yasuda_quant 直参照。

bot.name: EWJ Mon/Fri Intraday
bot.subtitle: EWJ 月曜+金曜のみ open BUY → close SELL (intraday only). 検証 Mon Sh+1.81 / Fri +1.61、overnight は持たない (Mon ovn -22.5%/yr 回避)
bot.role: EWJ Mon/Fri intraday LONG. 検証 2018-2025 (yasuda_quant prices/EWJ.pkl): Mon intraday Sh+1.81 (overnight -22.5%/yr ペナルティ回避)、Fri intraday Sh+1.61。火-木 skip。phase=daily MOO BUY (Mon/Fri open) → phase=moc MOC SELL (same day close)。overnight 一切持たない。sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-14 paper 配備承認。

today_signal.note: no action (not Mon/Fri or wrong phase)

bot.name: Earnings Universal
bot.subtitle: 502 ticker universal: pos surprise>=10% momentum + neg<=-5% dip-buy, 5d hold. n=2156 events Sh+1.31-1.82 robust
bot.role: Earnings universal surprise (502 ticker universe). 検証 2018-2025 n=2156 events: pos>=10% / hold=5d Sh+1.31 win 57.3% / neg<=-5% LONG (dip-buy) Sh+1.33 win 57.3%. earnings_bot (LLY/NVDA H3 のみ) の上位互換、universe 502× + bidirectional。daily phase auto、yasuda_quant/data/earnings_estimate/*_history.csv 経由。sleeve 1.5%×max 8 = 12% NetLiq。

bot.name: VIX TS Backward SPY Long
bot.subtitle: VIX/VIX3M >= 1.05 (backwardation = stress) → SPY 5d LONG. 検証 Sh+1.62 win 70.2% (n=57)、stress 後 mean reversion 取り、年 5-7 回 fire
bot.role: VIX termstructure backwardation → SPY LONG 5d. 検証 (2010-2025 n=2427 days): VIX/VIX3M ≥1.05 で fwd5d SPY mean+1.22% Sh+1.62 win 70.2% (n=57)。stress 後 mean reversion 取り、年 5-7 回 fire 想定。sleeve 10% NetLiq。yfinance daily fetch ^VIX/^VIX3M。user 2026-06-15 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: Expanded Overnight Basket
bot.subtitle: IWM/XLE/XLRE/XLU 4-ticker basket overnight sleeve. iwm_overnight_bot 後継、sector survey で intraday NEGATIVE が確定した 4 銘柄で diversification

stats.annual_est: ~12-15%/yr ovn (intraday -3% から逃れる効果含む)

bot.role: Expanded overnight basket (IWM/XLE/XLRE/XLU). iwm_overnight_bot 後継。sector overnight survey (2018-2025 yasuda_quant prices) で IWM (ovn Sh+1.10 / int Sh-0.35)、XLE (+0.89 / -0.27)、XLRE (+0.97 / -0.17)、XLU (+0.89 / +0.15) の 4 ticker は全て overnight 主体、intraday は弱い or マイナス。basket 化で sector 分散 + sample size 拡大。phase moc=buy close, daily=sell open。total sleeve 8% NetLiq (2% × 4)。user 2026-06-14 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: Options bot
bot.subtitle: VIX≥25 ゲート: SPY PCS (width-cap) + 条件付き put-write (d45-safe)
bot.role: VIX_LVL25 / VIX_COND_PUTWRITE + WHEEL_PCS_QQQ (PAPER-with-orders since 2026-06-08, autopilot armed).

bot.name: XLK Drop5d h1
bot.subtitle: XLK 5d c2c return <= -5% → 翌寄付 BUY → 翌々寄付 SELL (h1 LONG only). autopilot 2026-06-12 TIER_3 FLAG (raw cell)、XLF cell との同時 fire 時は panic_cap で entry skip
bot.role: XLK_DROP5D_COSTGATE_V1 paper observation (XLK 5d c2c return <= -5% → 翌営業日寄付 MOO BUY → 翌々営業日寄付 MOO SELL, LONG only h1). autopilot 2026-06-12T1518Z TIER_3 FLAG raw cell 正式化 (XLF より半 notch 下、resid 有意性 matched control のみ、β 成分 68-79%). typical cost (片道 7.5bp): net OOS raw +1.130%/trade oSh 5.33 NW-t 2.77. trigger 頻度 9.6/年 (XLF Fri cell の約 2 倍). XLF 重複 11 日 raw corr +0.821、panic_cap で XLF position 存在時 entry skip。sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-13 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: XLF Friday-Down h1
bot.subtitle: XLF 金曜 close 1d return <= -1.5% → 月曜寄付 MOO BUY → 火曜寄付 MOO SELL (1営業日 hold)。autopilot 2026-06-12T1507Z で TIER_3 FLAG 正式化、cost gate PASS。
bot.role: XLF_DIRECT_FRI_COSTGATE_V1 paper observation (XLF Friday 1d return <= -1.5% → 翌営業日 Mon 寄付 MOO BUY → 翌々営業日 Tue 寄付 MOO SELL). autopilot 2026-06-12T1507Z で TIER_3 FLAG 正式化、cost gate PASS (gross OOS +1.29%/trade, resid +0.22%, breakeven 片道 66bp / 実 spread 0.5-1bp で 130x 余裕). sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-12 paper 配備承認。daily phase で signal compute → 月曜寄付 MOO BUY / 火曜寄付 MOO SELL を auto fire。

bot.name: TLT bot
bot.subtitle: 長期国債 連続陰線dip (k3_h3 + k4_h5 併走)
bot.role: 4th pillar — TLT k3_h3 consec-down dip (LIVE since 2026-06-10、user 承認の dry → auto 昇格). broker_config 既 live mode + allow_live_orders=true、registry policy auto で本番取引。R6 maxloss 4.94%、p=0.0、2022年 bond crash 生存確認済。

bot.name: Analyst Signal
bot.subtitle: analyst raise +10%↑ OR initiation BUY → T+1 BUY → 10d hold → SELL. Womack 1996 anomaly 現代再現、Sh +0.69 / +0.74 robust

stats.r6: raise n=22k Sh+0.69 / init n=3.8k Sh+0.74

bot.role: Analyst raise / initiation BUY momentum (Womack 1996 anomaly 現代再現). target_PT >=+10% raise OR initiation buy → T+1 BUY → 10d hold → SELL (-10% stop). 検証: 21,959 raise events Sh+0.69 win 53.2% @ 5d / 3,810 init events Sh+0.74 win 55.1% @ 10d (yasuda_quant 2018-2025). sleeve 1% NetLiq × max 10 concurrent。yasuda_quant/data/analyst_recs/ を毎朝 scan、fetch_analyst_recs_extend.py で fresh 化推奨。user 2026-06-14 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: Berkshire Inverse
bot.subtitle: Berkshire 13F NEW position SHORT 20d. Buffett の新規は短期で伸びない性質、SHORT で Sh+1.40 win 67.5% (n=77). paper-only
bot.role: Berkshire 13F NEW position INVERSE (SHORT) 20d hold. 検証 (n=77, 2018-2025): Berkshire NEW pos を LONG する と Sh-1.40 win 32.5% (Buffett long-term value、20d では伸びず)、SHORT すると Sh+1.40 win 67.5%。Renaissance も同様 (n=6383 Sh+0.44 SHORT)、本 bot は Berkshire のみ。paper のみ (Cash live では short 不可)、per-pos 1.5% × max 5 = 7.5% gross short。user 2026-06-15 paper 配備承認。

bot.subtitle: 分足 reversion (K_5m SMH N3 / QQQ N3 highvol、 MACD-ride exit)
bot.role: K_5m_SMH / QQQ / E4 intraday reversion (BUILD-IN-PROGRESS). Auto-skipped until built.

today_signal.note: [--dry] broker 非接続。offline 最終 bar で判断のみ:

bot.name: Pre-FOMC Drift
bot.subtitle: FOMC announce 前日 close BUY TLT → 当日 close SELL. Lucca-Moench 2015 anomaly 現代再現 (Sh+0.86 64 events)
bot.role: Pre-FOMC drift (Lucca-Moench 2015). FOMC announce 前日 close BUY TLT → announce 当日 close SELL. 検証 2018-2025 n=64 events: TLT Sh+0.86 win 60.9% mean +0.27%/event. tlt_bot とは独立、年 8 events × 5% sleeve で ~+1%/yr 上乗せ。FOMC date list は 2026 まで hard-coded、後年 1 回追加要。

bot.name: Smart Money Tracker
bot.subtitle: 13F NEW position tracker (GATES FOUNDATION / PERSHING SQUARE / LONE PINE). sub-period robust 3 fund のみ、60d hold + -10% stop

stats.placebo: top-50 quick test +27.6%/yr は survivorship、full universe placebo p=0.376

bot.role: Smart money 13F NEW position tracker (GATES FOUNDATION / PERSHING SQUARE / LONE PINE). sub-period robust 3 fund のみ追従。Gates 2018-21 Sh+1.04 / 2022-25 Sh+1.43、Pershing 0.57/0.55、Lone Pine 0.66/0.51。yasuda_quant/data/13f/ + cusip_ticker_map.csv 経由で NEW position 検出、60d hold + -10% stop。user 2026-06-14 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: GLD USD Hedge
bot.subtitle: GLD bot の hedge overlay (UUP 常時保有、GLD pillar 50%×0.30=NetLiq 15%、drift 1pp rebalance)。単独保有意味なし、必ず GLD と組み合わせ
bot.role: GLD_USD_HEDGE_V1 paper observation (always-on static UUP overlay、no signal gate、target 15% of NetLiq (2026-06-13 user 確認: 15% 採用継続、06-10 10倍化済)、drift 1pp rebalance). autopilot 6 round (2026-06-09T2257Z..0050Z) で deploy-form 完全確定: vehicle=UUP / sizing=static H=0.30 / no timing trigger。残 deploy gate (live UUP L1 spread / forward OOS) を paper 観察で消化する位置づけ。composite Sharpe FULL 1.142 (vs noHedge 1.151)、stress 2021-23 で +0.055 hedge value、GLD corr -0.40。TIER_3 据置、deploy-form は最終確定。

bot.name: CEF x-sec bot
bot.subtitle: CEF 割安ロング/割高ショート cross-sectional (borrow gated)
bot.role: CEF cross-sectional discount LONG/SHORT — 2026-06-13 signal.py v2 simplified rewrite 完了。harness_ensemble.py 不在 (git 履歴空) のため path-dependent band-pick 経路を放棄、cef_nav CSV + _dailypricing.json から z-score 5y ranking のみで long/short basket 算出。turnover 抑制機構なし、long-leg のみ deploy 推奨、phase_ensemble は 1 sleeve fallback。入出力契約 (current_targets/current_targets_phase_ensemble) は維持、main.py/executor.py/borrow_probe.py 互換。検証は user PC で signal 動作確認後 dry→auto 昇格判断。

bot.name: Inverse Hedge
bot.subtitle: pillar 全体の drawdown guard (SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA が落ちた時、SH/PSQ/RWM/DOG が逆相関で支える保険)
bot.role: INVERSE_ETF_HEDGE_SLEEVE B_overlay L50 w0.25 4 pair (SPY/SH, QQQ/PSQ, IWM/RWM, DIA/DOG) drawdown guard sleeve (PAPER-with-orders since 2026-06-08).

bot.name: Earnings Post-Surprise
bot.subtitle: EPS surprise ≥ +10% → T+1 寄付 BUY → T+5 close SELL。LLY Sh 14.5 win 89%、NVDA Sh 7.5。yfinance で earnings date + surprise を毎朝チェック、days_since==1 で発動
bot.role: #4-1 earnings post-surprise momentum (paper). H3 rule: EPS surprise >= 10% → T+1 寄付 BUY → T+5 close SELL. backtest LLY Sharpe 14.5 win 89% mean +3.33% / NVDA Sh 7.5. watchlist: LLY/NVDA (H3) + LLY/PWR baseline (opt). sleeve 5% NetLiq、max 3 concurrent. yfinance Ticker.get_earnings_dates で surprise 取得、days_since==1 で entry fire、state.consumed_earnings で同 earnings の重複消費を抑制。user 2026-06-13 #4-1 deploy 承認。

bot.name: Legacy NAMED 5cell
bot.subtitle: 5 NAMED 戦略 paper basket (TripleScreen/WilliamsR/RSI35/RSI30/Drop5d)
bot.role: 5 legacy NAMED (TripleScreen/WilliamsR_90/RSI35/RSI30/Drop5d_7) paper forward (PAPER-with-orders since 2026-06-08).

bot.name: Breadth XS
bot.subtitle: BREADTH_XS_SPREAD_V1 (washout day XS reversal、observation overlay of dispersion_xs)
bot.role: BREADTH_XS_SPREAD_V1 paper observation (washout regime + dollar-neutral XS-reversal、breadth_z<=-1.0 で fire、top 10% loser LONG / winner SHORT、sleeve 2.5%). dispersion_xs と同一 edge 軸 (交互作用 t+0.58 null) のため独立 deploy 計上はせず paper 観察用 (PAPER-with-orders since 2026-06-09). edge は real selection α (ex-ante β hedge HAC-t +3.14 placebo 0.0002) ただし +0.64 net-long-beta tilt。autopilot 0157Z 採用、beta-source 弁別 0258Z 済。

today_signal.note: state: 20 active positions, 0 orders this run

bot.name: Dispersion XS
bot.subtitle: DISPERSION_XS_SPREAD_V1 (high-disp regime XS reversal、dollar-neutral)
bot.role: DISPERSION_XS_SPREAD_V1 dollar-neutral cross-sectional reversal (paper-with-orders since 2026-06-09). regime z>=1.0 で fire、cache_1h 101 stocks 中 top 20% losers LONG / winners SHORT。market beta -0.12 (neutral)、OOS gross +62.8%/yr Sharpe 1.77 / HAC-t 1.22 / placebo p 0.121 (字義 PASS 未達、TIER_3 FLAG)。autopilot 2026-06-09T0044Z 採用、robustness 検証 0113Z 済。

today_signal.note: state: 0 active positions, 0 orders this run

bot.name: Insider bot
bot.subtitle: CFO単独インサイダー買い basket (filing+1寄り/3日hold)
bot.role: Insider CFO solo P-buy basket (INSU_CFO_SOLO_H3). 2026-06-13 user test PASS: signal 動作確認、CFO solo filter (value>=$50k, prior30d>=-0.1, lookback=3d) で NO SIGNAL も正常 path 通過。pickle dtype 問題は user pandas upgrade で解消。daily 経路 dry: form4 ingest + signal eval + 候補 print、broker 接続なし。paper-with-orders 化は user broker_config.allow_live_orders 承認後 (現 false で出荷)。

bot.name: J1 仕手 fade watch
bot.subtitle: JP 株 watchlist の 5d c2c return >= +50% を毎朝監視。FIRE 検出時 alerts.csv 記録。IBKR JP short 不可前提のため発注なし、user 通知のみ。watch: 4424/6085/7746/7999/6217

stats.placebo: edge 減衰中 → watch のみ

bot.role: J1 仕手 fade watchlist 監視 (observation only, no broker, no orders). user 指定 5 銘柄 (4424.T/6085.T/7746.T/7999.T/6217.T) を毎朝 daily_auto で yfinance fetch、5d c2c return >= 50% で FIRE alert、>=30% で WARN。発火時 logs/j1_alerts.csv + state.json 更新、PWA に push。IBKR JP short 不可前提のため発注なし。J1 robustness 減衰中 (last 12mo Sh 0.68) のため deploy ではなく user watch 用 surface。

cards.title: bot 別 含み損益 (相対)

cards.text: autopilot_enabled = ON。 live broker_config の bot は実発注し得ます。
閾値: 集中度 25% / DD 3.0% (config.toml [alerts] で調整可)。 VIX 緊急閾は file 取得時のみ評価。
